products.name: UV Protection Sunglasses
products.description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. These premium sunglasses block 100% of UVA and UVB rays, keeping your eyes safe while looking trendy at the beach or pool.

products.name: Floral Beach Dress
products.description: Light and breezy floral beach dress made from 100% breathable cotton. Perfect for beach days, brunches, or casual summer outings. Features a comfortable loose fit and vibrant tropical print.

products.name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
products.description: Broad spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen lotion that protects your skin from harmful UV rays. Water-resistant formula lasts up to 80 minutes. Lightweight, non-greasy and suitable for all skin types.

products.name: Beach Tote Bag
products.description: Spacious and stylish beach tote bag made from durable canvas material. Features multiple pockets, a zippered compartment, and comfortable shoulder straps. Perfect for carrying all your beach essentials.

products.name: Surfboard Shorts
products.description: Quick-dry surfboard shorts with a bold tropical print. Made from recycled polyester with UPF 30+ protection. Features a secure drawstring waist and side pockets, ideal for surfing or beach volleyball.

products.name: Aloe Vera After Sun Gel
products.description: Soothing aloe vera after sun gel that cools and repairs sun-exposed skin instantly. Enriched with vitamin E and cucumber extract for deep hydration. Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin.

products.name: Straw Sun Hat
products.description: Classic wide-brim straw sun hat offering excellent shade and style. Lightweight and breathable with an adjustable inner band for a perfect fit. Foldable design makes it easy to pack for travel.

products.name: Waterproof Sandals
products.description: Comfortable waterproof sandals designed for beach and water activities. Features a non-slip rubber sole, adjustable straps, and quick-dry material. Available in multiple colors and sizes.
